name: ha-pr-comment-audit
tagline: Audits a Home Assistant GitHub PR's review-comment threads and flags unaddressed feedback, console-only.
verdict: Small and safely bounded — explicitly forbids acting on GitHub, output stays in the console. Main gaps: the comment-fetching step names no concrete command, there's no guidance for gh auth/missing-PR failures, and the gh dependency isn't declared or checked.

highlights.summary: "Fetch the review comment threads for the PR (e.g. 'gh api' for review threads/comments)" names no concrete endpoint/command for determining thread-resolution status.
No mention anywhere of what to do if gh is unauthenticated, the PR can't be resolved, or the API call fails.
Entire skill depends on the gh CLI being installed and authenticated, with no upfront check or install guidance.
